title: JOHN DAY CANYON CITY PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT - 211info
text: JOHN DAY CANYON CITY PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT JOHN DAY CANYON CITY PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Parks and Recreation Department for the City of John Day. Facilities include baseball and softball fields, tennis and basketball courts, walking and running trails, playgrounds, and a splash pad. 845 North West Bridge Street John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 575-0110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-0110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Public Parks Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FREE SUMMER LUNCHES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
